problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: If Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
